name: Rice Pudding
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup soy milk (fat-free Soy Moo from Health Valley)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked brown rice, soy milk, water, honey, vanilla extract, and cinnamon in a large bowl.
2. Cover the mixture and bake for 45 minutes or until set.
3. Remove from heat and let cool before serving.
